components.name: Accordion

<Accordion.Root allowsMultipleExpanded>

      <Accordion.Trigger>Section Two</Accordion.Trigger>

      Try opening this while the first section is still open.
    </Accordion.Panel>
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion.Root>

<Accordion.Root defaultExpandedKeys={['a']}>

    <Accordion.Header>
      <Accordion.Trigger>Initially Open</Accordion.Trigger>

    <Accordion.Panel>

  </Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item id="b">

      <Accordion.Trigger>Initially Closed</Accordion.Trigger>

<Accordion.Root isDisabled>

components.name: CheckboxGroup

props.name: label
props.description: An accessible label for the checkbox group.

props.name: description
props.description: A description for the checkbox group. Displays below the group.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout orientation. Sets `data-orientation` for CSS styling.

props.name: size
props.description: Propagates size to all child Checkbox.Root components.

examples:
import { CheckboxGroup } from '@tale-ui/react/checkbox-group';

import { Check } from 'lucide-react';

    Cherry
  </Checkbox.Root>

<CheckboxGroup label="Disabled group" isDisabled>

  </Checkbox.Root>
  <Checkbox.Root value="banana">
    <Checkbox.Indicator><Icon icon={Check} size="sm" /></Checkbox.Indicator>
    Banana

components.name: Dialog
examples:
const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

<Dialog.Root isOpen={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>

    <Dialog.Popup>
      <Dialog.Close aria-label="Close" />
      <Dialog.Title>Delete account</Dialog.Title>
      <Dialog.Description>

      </Dialog.Description>
      <Dialog.Actions>
        <Button variant="neutral" onPress={() => setOpen(false)}>Cancel</Button>
        <Button variant="danger" onPress={() => setOpen(false)}>Delete</Button>
      </Dialog.Actions>
    </Dialog.Popup>
  </Dialog.Backdrop>
</Dialog.Root>

const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

<Dialog.Root isOpen={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <Dialog.Trigger className="tale-button--neutral">Open Dismissable</Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Backdrop isDismissable>
    <Dialog.Popup>
      <Dialog.Close aria-label="Close" />
      <Dialog.Title>Dismissable Dialog</Dialog.Title>
      <Dialog.Description>
        Click the backdrop or press Escape to dismiss this dialog.
      </Dialog.Description>
      <Dialog.Actions>
        <Button variant="neutral" onPress={() => setOpen(false)}>Dismiss</Button>
      </Dialog.Actions>
    </Dialog.Popup>
  </Dialog.Backdrop>
</Dialog.Root>
